changelog: New！ Webpage zoom from HA—real-time scaling via automation, rotary encoder ready. Distance-triggered: 2m zoom-out for overview, 4m zoom-in for alerts. Repurpose old tablets as context-aware dashboards. Fixed Bluetooth capability descriptions with info cards (#49 @KeyRie). Protocol music sync stabilized—enable Low Memory Mode and adjust audio offset (~-200ms) if drift occurs. Display adaptation improved. Added transparent settings button—hide top-right corner for cleaner UI, access remains via corner tap. Screens that sense you.
